title: The Clar

'''The Clar''' was an astronomical object<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> located within [[The Clar system/Legends|the Clar system]], a part of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of the [[Vivab deserts]], a zone of [[Water/Legends|ice]]-swept plains. The [[Morellian]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Barosa Warren]] and [[Casti Tholon]], his [[Human/Legends|Human]] student at the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], had visited the Clar by<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> where they explored and charted the Vivab [[Desert/Legends|deserts]].<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Clar was first mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Alliance Intelligence Reports" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Clar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the Clar itself, in grid square I-20.<ref name="TEA" />
